user_query: Update mothers teriyaki salmon bowl lunch to a tofu based dish

updates.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 4 > Mother > Day 2 > Lunch > Japanese Teriyaki Salmon Donburi

meal_suggestion.from: Pan-sear salmon skin-side down until crispy, then glaze with a mix of soy sauce, mirin, and a touch of sugar. Serve over steamed rice with steamed broccoli and a small mound of pickled ginger. Garnish with sesame seeds and sliced nori.
meal_suggestion.to: Press and drain firm tofu, then slice into cubes or slabs. Marinate briefly in a mixture of low-sodium soy sauce, mirin, a splash of sake (optional), grated garlic and ginger, and a touch of brown sugar. Lightly coat tofu in cornstarch and pan-sear in a little neutral oil until golden and crisp. Reduce the remaining marinade into a glossy teriyaki glaze and toss the tofu to coat. Serve over steamed white or brown rice with steamed broccoli, a small mound of pickled ginger, a sprinkle of toasted sesame seeds, sliced nori, and chopped scallions.

nutrition_note.from: Salmon is rich in omega-3 fatty acids supporting heart and brain health; broccoli provides fiber, vitamin C, and sulforaphane; rice offers sustained energy. Teriyaki glaze contains sodium and sugar — make homemade to control amounts. Pickled ginger aids digestion.
nutrition_note.to: Switching to firm tofu provides high-quality plant protein with lower saturated fat than salmon; tofu can be a good source of calcium and iron when made with calcium coagulants. Steaming the broccoli preserves vitamins and adds fiber. Using a homemade, low-sodium teriyaki glaze controls added sugar and salt; pan-searing with minimal oil keeps the dish satisfying while limiting added fats.

short_description.from: Pan-seared salmon fillet glazed with homemade teriyaki sauce, served over a bowl of steamed rice with steamed broccoli and pickled ginger.
short_description.to: Crispy pan-seared marinated tofu glazed with homemade teriyaki sauce, served over steamed rice with steamed broccoli and pickled ginger — a satisfying plant-based alternative to the salmon bowl.

updates.reasoning: Transformed the salmon donburi into a tofu-based teriyaki donburi. Rewrote name, description, meal_suggestion, ingredients, and nutrition_note to reflect the plant-based substitution and corresponding preparation.
